_comment: Media bias annotations for all RSS sources. Used by AI reasoning to weight and contextualize news. Bias assessment based on AllSides and MediaBiasFactCheck.com for Western sources; Chinese sources rated by AI estimation (clearly marked). Updated quarterly.
_methodology: Ratings based on AllSides and MediaBiasFactCheck.com for Western sources; Chinese sources rated by AI estimation (clearly marked). lean: -1.0(far-left) to +1.0(far-right), 0=center. factual_reliability: 0-1.0. ownership_flag: state/corporate/independent.

BBC Business.known_biases: UK government perspective on foreign policy; generally balanced on economics

NYT Business.owner: The New York Times Company (Sulzberger family)
NYT Business.known_biases: US liberal establishment viewpoint; pro-free trade; critical of populism
NYT Business.assessment_source: AllSides: Left; MBFC: High factual, left-center bias

AP News.known_biases: Wire service — factual, minimal editorial; slight US institutional perspective
AP News.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: Very High factual

Financial Times.known_biases: Pro-market, globalist perspective; strongest financial journalism globally
Financial Times.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: Very High factual

WSJ Top Stories.known_biases: News pages factual; editorial page strongly conservative/pro-business; anti-regulation
WSJ Top Stories.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: news=High factual, editorial=right-center

The Economist Finance.owner: Economist Group (Exor NV (Agnelli family, majority shareholder))
The Economist Finance.known_biases: Classical liberal; pro-free trade, pro-globalization, pro-immigration; critical of both left populism and right nationalism
The Economist Finance.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: High factual, least biased

CNBC Top News.known_biases: Pro-market, pro-Wall Street perspective; focuses on investor sentiment; may amplify market narratives

CNBC World.known_biases: US-centric world view; may underweight non-Western perspectives

MarketWatch Top.known_biases: Market-focused; retail investor oriented; may sensationalize market moves

Forbes Business.known_biases: Pro-business, pro-entrepreneurship; contributor model means variable quality
Forbes Business.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: High factual, right-center

Bloomberg Markets.known_biases: Pro-market, data-driven; strong financial journalism; Bloomberg's political involvement may influence editorial
Bloomberg Markets.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: Very High factual

Business Insider.known_biases: Clickbait tendency; variable quality; listicle format
Business Insider.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: High factual but mixed reliability

CNN Business Economy.known_biases: US liberal perspective on economy; anti-Trump economic coverage
CNN Business Economy.assessment_source: AllSides: Left; MBFC: left-center, mostly factual

The Guardian Business.known_biases: Progressive/left-leaning; critical of austerity, pro-social spending; strong investigative journalism
The Guardian Business.assessment_source: AllSides: Left; MBFC: High factual, left-center

Al Jazeera.known_biases: Qatari foreign policy perspective; critical of Saudi Arabia/UAE; sympathetic to Muslim Brotherhood; valuable non-Western perspective on Middle East
Al Jazeera.assessment_source: AllSides: Center; MBFC: Mixed factual (propaganda on some topics)

Yahoo Finance.known_biases: Aggregator — content quality varies by source; retail investor focused

Seeking Alpha Currents.known_biases: Crowd-sourced analysis; contributor quality varies wildly; potential conflicts of interest (contributors may hold positions)

Investing.com.known_biases: Data-focused aggregator; minimal editorial bias but ad-heavy; some clickbait

ZeroHedge.known_biases: Extreme bearish bias; conspiracy-adjacent; anti-Fed, anti-establishment; gold/crypto promotion; occasionally breaks real stories but mixes with sensationalism. TREAT WITH HIGH SKEPTICISM.
ZeroHedge.assessment_source: AllSides: Right; MBFC: Questionable Source, Conspiracy-Pseudoscience category, low factual reporting

CoinTelegraph.known_biases: Pro-crypto inherent bias; may overhype bull narratives; promotional content mixed with news

CoinDesk.owner: Bullish (crypto exchange, Justin Sun-linked acquisition controversy)
CoinDesk.known_biases: Pro-crypto but more balanced than CoinTelegraph; ownership change raised editorial independence concerns

The Block.known_biases: Crypto industry publication; research-oriented; past controversy over undisclosed Alameda Research funding

OilPrice.com.known_biases: Energy industry perspective; may downplay energy transition urgency; some sensationalist headlines

Mining.com.known_biases: Mining industry perspective; may understate environmental concerns

Sina Finance Hot.known_biases: Operates within Chinese media environment; self-censorship on politically sensitive economic topics; aggregator format
Sina Finance Hot.china_media_note: 在中国媒体环境下运营，涉及政治敏感经济话题会自我审查

Caixin Latest.owner: Caixin Media (Hu Shuli, known for investigative journalism)
Caixin Latest.known_biases: Best Chinese financial journalism; relatively independent within system constraints; pro-market reform. MOST TRUSTWORTHY Chinese source.
Caixin Latest.china_media_note: 在中国金融媒体中可信度最高，有独立调查传统，但仍受制度约束
Caixin Latest.assessment_source: Industry consensus: most independent major Chinese financial outlet

WallStreetCN Global.owner: Wall Street Jian Wen (华尔街见闻)
WallStreetCN Global.known_biases: Market-focused; translates Western news for Chinese audience; may add nationalistic framing
WallStreetCN Global.china_media_note: 以翻译西方金融新闻为主，可能添加民族主义框架

Yicai Headlines.known_biases: State media but market-oriented; good for Shanghai/China policy signals; reflects government economic narrative
Yicai Headlines.china_media_note: 上海国企控制，市场化运营，反映政府经济政策信号

CLS Telegraph.known_biases: Real-time financial news wire; speed-focused; minimal analysis; good for breaking Chinese market news
CLS Telegraph.china_media_note: 实时财经快讯，速度优先，分析不多但中国市场突发新闻有价值

EastMoney Strategy.owner: East Money Information (东方财富, listed on SSE)
EastMoney Strategy.known_biases: Retail investor platform; research reports may have sell-side bias; stock promotion risk
EastMoney Strategy.china_media_note: 散户平台，研报可能有卖方偏见

FT Chinese.known_biases: Chinese translation of FT content + original Chinese commentary; higher quality than most Chinese outlets; occasionally blocked in China
FT Chinese.china_media_note: FT中文版，含FT翻译+中文原创评论，质量高于大多数中文媒体

iFeng Finance.known_biases: HK-origin but now aligned with mainland; pro-business; some clickbait
iFeng Finance.china_media_note: 港资背景但现与大陆立场趋同

NetEase Finance.known_biases: Portal site; content quality varies; aggregator + original; some sensationalism
NetEase Finance.china_media_note: 门户网站，内容质量参差

21st Century Biz Herald.owner: Nanfang Media Group (南方报业, state-owned)
21st Century Biz Herald.known_biases: Relatively independent within state media; good for business/economics coverage; Guangdong-based perspective
21st Century Biz Herald.china_media_note: 南方报业旗下，在国媒中相对独立，商业经济报道有价值

Economic Observer.owner: Shandong Sanlian Group (山东三联集团)
Economic Observer.known_biases: Known for investigative business journalism; has published critical reports; relatively bold within Chinese media constraints
Economic Observer.china_media_note: 以调查报道著称，在中国媒体中相对大胆

Securities Times Express.owner: People's Daily (人民日报社, CPC organ)
Securities Times Express.known_biases: Official securities media; reflects CSRC/government securities policy signals; useful for policy direction, not for independent analysis
Securities Times Express.china_media_note: 人民日报旗下证券媒体，反映证监会/政府证券政策信号

China Securities Journal.known_biases: Official securities media under Xinhua; similar to Securities Times — policy signal value
China Securities Journal.china_media_note: 新华社旗下证券媒体，政策信号价值

Shanghai Securities News.known_biases: Same category as China Securities Journal — official voice for securities regulation
Shanghai Securities News.china_media_note: 新华社旗下，上交所官方喉舌

National Business Daily.owner: Chengdu Media Group (成都传媒集团)
National Business Daily.known_biases: Business-focused; relatively market-oriented; good for corporate news
National Business Daily.china_media_note: 商业定位，市场化程度较高

Jiemian Finance.owner: Shanghai United Media Group (上海报业集团)
Jiemian Finance.known_biases: Digital-first; younger audience; mix of serious and lifestyle content
Jiemian Finance.china_media_note: 数字化优先，读者偏年轻，严肃与生活方式混合

The Paper Finance.owner: Shanghai United Media Group (上海报业集团)
The Paper Finance.known_biases: Among the best Chinese digital news outlets; investigative tradition (within limits); social issues coverage
The Paper Finance.china_media_note: 中国最好的数字新闻媒体之一，有调查传统（在限度内）

Xinhua Finance.owner: Xinhua News Agency (新华社, CPC state media)
Xinhua Finance.known_biases: OFFICIAL STATE MEDIA. Useful for understanding CPC policy positions and official narrative. NOT reliable for independent analysis. Financial data from Xinhua may be curated to support policy objectives.
Xinhua Finance.china_media_note: 官方通讯社。理解党的政策立场有价值，但不可作为独立分析来源。金融数据可能被筛选以支持政策目标。

People's Daily Finance.owner: CPC Central Committee (中共中央委员会 party organ)
People's Daily Finance.known_biases: CPC OFFICIAL ORGAN. Pure policy signal value — what CPC wants the public to think about the economy. NOT journalism in Western sense. Useful as counter-indicator: when People's Daily says economy is fine, it may mean there are concerns.
People's Daily Finance.china_media_note: 党报。纯政策信号价值——党希望公众如何看待经济。非西方意义上的新闻。反向指标：当人民日报说经济很好时，可能意味着有隐忧。
People's Daily Finance.assessment_source: RSF: Not free; MBFC: state-controlled, very low factual

China Economy Net.owner: Economic Daily (经济日报, State Council)
China Economy Net.known_biases: State Council-affiliated economic media; policy-aligned reporting
China Economy Net.china_media_note: 国务院旗下经济日报主办，政策导向报道

Global Times Finance.owner: People's Daily (人民日报社, CPC organ)
Global Times Finance.known_biases: NATIONALIST PROPAGANDA OUTLET. Deliberately inflammatory on geopolitics. Finance section is secondary to propaganda mission. TREAT WITH HIGH SKEPTICISM — useful only for understanding Chinese nationalist narrative, not for factual analysis.
Global Times Finance.china_media_note: 民族主义宣传媒体。地缘政治报道刻意煽动。金融板块是宣传任务的附属。高度怀疑——仅用于理解中国民族主义叙事，不可作为事实分析。

Gelonghui.known_biases: HK/China cross-border finance; community-driven analysis; variable quality
Gelonghui.china_media_note: 港股/中概股分析社区，质量参差

Jin10 Data.known_biases: Real-time data/news terminal; Chinese equivalent of investing.com; data-focused, minimal editorial

Zhitong Finance.known_biases: HK/US stock focused; translates foreign research; variable quality
Zhitong Finance.china_media_note: 港美股资讯为主，翻译外国研报

White House.known_biases: Official presidential communications. Policy signal value = very high. Spin/framing = inherent. Factual on announced actions, biased on rationale.

State Dept Press.known_biases: US foreign policy perspective by definition; diplomatic language may obscure reality

SEC Press Releases.known_biases: Regulatory actions — highest factual reliability; no editorial bias; enforcement-focused

CFTC Press.known_biases: Same as SEC — regulatory, factual, no editorial bias

Federal Reserve Press.known_biases: Central bank communications — factual but deliberately vague (Fedspeak). Forward guidance may be intentionally misleading to manage expectations.

USTR Trade.owner: Office of the United States Trade Representative
USTR Trade.known_biases: US trade policy perspective; actions are factual, rationale reflects administration trade ideology

aggregate_bias_assessment.western_bias_note: 53个媒体源中28个来自西方(美国为主)，24个来自中国(含FT中文版)，非西方/非中国源仅1个(Al Jazeera)。另有6个政府源。存在明显的双极偏见风险——西方叙事和中国叙事的碰撞，缺少第三世界、东南亚、印度、非洲视角。
aggregate_bias_assessment.recommendation: AI推理时应：(1)对西方和中国源同等怀疑；(2)交叉验证跨阵营共识；(3)重点关注两方都报道的事实部分，忽略各自的框架叙事；(4)未来考虑添加印度(Times of India/Economic Times)、日本(Nikkei)、中东(Arab News)、非洲(Africa Report)源以平衡
aggregate_bias_assessment.state_media_warning: 5个国家媒体(新华/人民/环球/白宫/国务院)作为政策信号源有价值，但绝不可作为独立事实来源
